<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::foo]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::foo]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    [provider=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::foo::21ca94db-8b6b-489c-be33-91fe9368358b]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typB: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA$pkgA:m:typB::foo]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 3 created<{%reset%}>

<{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Duration:<{%reset%}> 1s
